title: Marrow Debt
text: Someone stitched you back together with credit you did not sign for.
flavor: The sutures tighten whenever coin changes hands.
trigger: When you gain trophies from an enemy or contract.
penalty: Gain 1 fewer trophy, then record a debt note.

effect.text: Marrow Debt collected: reduce the next trophy gain by 1.

relief: At a surgery space, spend 2 trophies to clear one debt note and suppress this scar for the session.
upside: When you pay the debt, heal 1 wound.
